name: io.github.mshegolev/kafka-mcp
description: Read-only Kafka MCP brick — list topics, describe partitions, search messages by key in a time window, retrieve individual messages; safe for investigator agents.

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka broker addresses, e.g. broker1:9092,broker2:9092

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL
environmentVariables.description: Security protocol: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL

environmentVariables.name: SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Confluent Schema Registry URL for Avro/Protobuf/JSON Schema decode

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-signed certs.

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host to bind the HTTP server (default 127.0.0.1)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port to bind the HTTP server (default 8000)

environmentVariables.name: SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Confluent Schema Registry URL for decode
